meta.title: CloudAnzen — Continuous Compliance and Trust Operations for AI-Native Teams
meta.description: CloudAnzen helps AI-native teams get audit-ready faster with compliance workflows, trust center capabilities, continuous monitoring, and AI-assisted security review workflows.

hero.badge: Bring your own AI. Operate with proof.
hero.title: Connect your AI agent to
hero.subtitle: Use your own AI key with CloudAnzen MCP to automate questionnaires, translate vulnerabilities into risks, validate evidence, and guide posture fixes with humans in control.

ask.title: Ask your AI agent to operate with context
ask.description: CloudAnzen starts with the request, not a static dashboard. Your AI agent gets directed into real trust operations work with the right guardrails.

assemble.title: Assemble trust context through MCP
assemble.description: Questionnaires, vulnerabilities, evidence, controls, and policy context stream into one structured layer your model can reason over safely.

act.title: Run high-value trust workflows
act.description: The agent drafts answers, translates findings into risks, validates supporting evidence, and proposes the next posture fix from the same operating model.

approve.title: Keep humans in control for high-impact changes
approve.description: CloudAnzen pauses sensitive actions behind approval gates so security teams can review, approve, and preserve an audit trail.

resolve.title: Finish with validated outcomes
resolve.description: The result is not more AI output. It is a ready draft, a registered risk, verified evidence, and a tracked remediation task tied back to the change.

prompt.label: Agent prompt
prompt.value: Review our latest security posture, prepare buyer trust responses, and queue the next fixes.

engine.label: CloudAnzen orchestration layer
engine.title: CloudAnzen MCP context engine
engine.description: Your model reasons across controls, evidence, risks, fixes, and approvals without losing traceability or workflow state.

questionnaire.title: Draft questionnaire answers
questionnaire.description: Pull approved answers and current proof instead of rewriting every response.

risk.title: Translate findings into business risk
risk.description: Map vulnerabilities into owned, prioritized risk records with context.

evidence.title: Validate supporting evidence
evidence.description: Check whether uploaded proof actually supports the claimed control.

fix.title: Recommend the next posture fix
fix.description: Turn posture gaps into tracked remediation work instead of loose suggestions.

approval.title: Human approval gate
approval.description: High-impact actions pause for review before CloudAnzen updates posture and downstream trust artifacts.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Security reviews move faster than your compliance ops
problem.subtitle: AI-native teams need to prove trust early, but evidence, questionnaires, and audit prep still get stitched together across spreadsheets, shared drives, and Slack threads.

items.painDesc: Chasing screenshots and documents slows every audit cycle.
items.outcomeDesc: Connect systems and gather evidence continuously.

items.painDesc: Answering buyer questionnaires repeatedly slows deals and overloads lean teams.
items.outcomeDesc: Reuse approved answers and attach supporting evidence from one place.

items.painDesc: Prospects want security documents, policy answers, and proof before your team is ready.
items.outcomeDesc: Share trust-center content and supporting evidence from one source of truth.

items.painDesc: Teams lose track of who owns what and what still needs attention.
items.outcomeDesc: Track controls, tasks, reviews, and due dates in one place.

platformModules.label: The Platform
platformModules.title: One platform for audit readiness and buyer trust
platformModules.subtitle: Start with the workflows that unblock enterprise deals, then grow into broader compliance, risk, and control operations over time.

modules.title: Compliance Automation
modules.desc: Get SOC 2 and ISO-ready faster with controls, evidence, and audit workflows in one place.

modules.title: Trust Center
modules.desc: Share security posture, policies, and reports without slowing your team down.

modules.title: Questionnaire Automation
modules.desc: Respond faster to security reviews with reusable answers and supporting evidence.

modules.title: Continuous Monitoring
modules.desc: Track control health continuously instead of relying on point-in-time checks.

modules.title: Risk Management
modules.desc: Record risks, assign owners, track treatment plans, and maintain visibility.

modules.title: Vendor Risk Management
modules.desc: Review vendors with standardized workflows and ongoing oversight.

modules.title: Policy Management
modules.desc: Centralize policies, approvals, reviews, and version history.

modules.title: Audit Readiness
modules.desc: Organize evidence and streamline auditor collaboration.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: How CloudAnzen works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get from scattered security work to audit-ready operations in days, not months.

steps.title: Connect your systems
steps.desc: Integrate cloud infrastructure, identity providers, ticketing tools, HR systems, and collaboration apps in minutes.

steps.title: Monitor controls and collect evidence
steps.desc: CloudAnzen maps evidence to controls and highlights gaps before they become audit problems.

steps.title: Manage risk and prove trust
steps.desc: Track remediation, review vendors, and share trust artifacts with customers from one source of truth.

frameworks.label: Frameworks
frameworks.title: Support multiple frameworks without duplicating work
frameworks.subtitle: Build once and reuse controls across your security and privacy program. CloudAnzen maps shared controls automatically, so you never duplicate effort across frameworks.
features: Shared control library across all frameworks
Automatic evidence mapping to multiple audits
Custom framework support for internal standards

integrations.label: Integrations
integrations.title: Connect the systems your controls already depend on
integrations.subtitle: CloudAnzen pulls evidence automatically from your cloud, identity, HR, and engineering tools — so your controls are always up to date.
integrations.seeAll: And dozens more via API and custom integrations.

trustCenter.label: Trust Center
trustCenter.title: Turn security into a business advantage

features.title: Publish a trust center
features.desc: Give customers and prospects a dedicated page showing your security posture.

features.title: Share policies and reports securely
features.desc: Gate access to documents with NDA workflows and access request flows.

features.title: Reduce repetitive questionnaire work
features.desc: Reuse approved answers and evidence packages across all security reviews.

features.title: Help buyers evaluate you faster
features.desc: Remove friction from enterprise procurement with always-current compliance badges.

testimonial.label: Customer story
testimonial.title: Built to help lean teams move faster
testimonial.quote: CloudAnzen gave us a single place to manage controls, evidence, vendor reviews, and audit prep. What used to take weeks now feels operational.
testimonial.author: Jordan Torres

finalCta.title: Ready to become audit-ready faster?
finalCta.subtitle: Use CloudAnzen to streamline compliance work, answer buyer security reviews faster, and build trust without spreadsheet-heavy ops.
